title: P0: Fix ExecutionManagerImpl JSON round-trip type fidelity loss
description:
ExecutionManagerImpl.DispatchAsync serializes ActionData.Arguments (Dictionary<string, object?>) to JSON, then parses it back to JsonElement — a full serialize/parse round-trip that loses type fidelity (long→int, decimal precision loss, etc.). The code's own design note acknowledges this was deferred from Sprint 40 but is now ~18 sprints overdue.

Fix: Add a direct ActionData→JsonElement conversion path in ToolDispatcher or IToolCaller to avoid the round-trip. Alternatively, change CallWithOutcomeAsync to accept Dictionary<string, object?> directly.

Source: internal-audit-57-20260701.md — P0-6
